But as his reputation grows, so do the dangers—outlaws, rival hunters, and his own thirst for power push him toward a violent reckoning. With stark desert landscapes, brutal gunfights, and the grit of Italian Western style, this tale shows the high price of killing for gold.

programme.title: Xplash Ep101
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode we’ll go whitewater kayaking in Canada, BASE Jumping in Idaho, hand-feeding & flipping tiger sharks in the Bahamas, and get a close-up view of the adrenalized new sport of canyoning.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep102: Giant Manta Rays of San Benedicto
programme.desc: Giants of San Benedicto features Dr. Robert Rubin and his ground-breaking research of giant Mantas. You'll travel to the remote Socorro Islands off Mexico's Pacific coast and see breath-taking encounters with enormous manta rays.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 2 is star-studded and action-packed! Get ready for amazing celebrity guests; and you know Don and Sheriff Lamb won't be giving the contestants a break. The challenges keep coming as SAR USA brings in a former FBI agent & trainer to put our contestants through an adrenaline-pumping exercise. Will all the contestants make it through the day? Watch now to find out!

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Day 4 of Season 3 kicks off with some much anticipated shooting.. or does it? This course of fire is actually using the latest cutting-edge CO2 technologies to train the contestants with another option for nonlethal force. Having a new weaponry option tucked in their arsenal, the competitors set out on their first recon mission for their CIA mission. Trudging through Alligator infested waters to their rendezvous point, the weight of the successful mission hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For physical training, Don does something unexpected when he hands over the reins to a contestant to lead. One would think that would make for an easy go of it, if it weren’t for the 3-time Olympian that was now in charge. Next, co-host Mike Glover leads Surviving Mann’s first ever After-Action report to debrief the previous night’s mission. Afterwards, the infamous Blah line makes its season debut to the contestants’ chagrin.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 6 kicks off with some much anticipated weapons training and tactical shooting. Armed with some killer Black Aces shotguns, the teams are challenged with a unique course of fire. From there, Athlon Optics and Modern Pneumatic Sporting Devices configure a hunting air rifle for the contestants to play with.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 1
programme.desc: The $10,000 WPT L.A. Poker Classic brings the stars to Las Vegas! Darren Elias headlines looking for his fifth career WPT title and standing in his way are WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas and seasoned pro David Baker. The $1 million first-place prize and a prize pool of more than $5 million are on the line in Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 2
programme.desc: Darren Elias is in the chip lead looking for a record-breaking fifth WPT title and his first $1 million score. The talented WPT L.A. Poker Classic final table includes David Baker and Matas Cimbolas, both looking to become a poker-made millionaire and win a luxurious Hublot watch.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 3
programme.desc: Play is down to three-handed in Las Vegas for the WPT L.A. Poker Classic title and race to win $1 million. The largest televised prize of Season XVII on the World Poker Tour awaits Darren Elias, Matas Cimbolas, and David Baker as all bring their A-game in pursuit of one of poker’s most prestigious events.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 4
programme.desc: The final battle for $1 million is here at HyperX Esports Arena for the WPT L.A. Poker Classic title. See if Darren Elias can win his fifth WPT or if David Baker has other ideas to win his first while Matas Cimbolas plays for a prestigious second win of his own.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown 2020 - Part 1
programme.desc: An incredible lineup of poker is at HyperX Esports Arena as a field of 1,360 players is down to only six in Las Vegas. Maria Ho headlines looking for her first WPT title and the $715,000 first-place prize and a total prize pool of $4.35 million is on the line. Eric Afriat also plays for his second WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown win and third overall WPT title.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.
